$notes.v1_activation: icebergCompatV1 is activated by two conditions: (1) the feature listed in writerFeatures, and (2) the table property delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true. When active, columnMapping must be in name or id mode, deletionVectors must not be supported, partition values must be materialized, and Map/Array/Void types are forbidden.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_create_table_2_7_feature_listed_property_true_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV1] table with columnMapping mode=name and delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true succeeds.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_create_table_3_7_feature_listed_property_true_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[columnMapping in readerFeatures and writerFeatures, icebergCompatV1] table with columnMapping mode=name and delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true succeeds; (3,7) with columnMapping in readerFeatures is a valid alternate protocol path.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_supported_not_active_create_table_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV1] table without delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true succeeds; icebergCompatV1 writer requirements only apply when the feature is active.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_create_table_2_7_no_feature_listed_property_true_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true but icebergCompatV1 absent from writerFeatures succeeds.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_create_table_2_7_missing_column_mapping_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[icebergCompatV1] table without columnMapping in writerFeatures and delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true fails; the spec requires columnMapping to be co-listed.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_create_table_2_7_column_mapping_not_active_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV1] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true but no columnMapping mode set fails; the spec requires columnMapping to be active in name or id mode when ICv1 is active.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_create_table_2_7_with_deletion_vectors_active_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV1,deletionVectors] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true and delta.enableDeletionVectors=true fails; ICv1 requires deletionVectors not be supported.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_create_table_2_7_with_deletion_vectors_supported_not_active_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV1,deletionVectors] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true but without delta.enableDeletionVectors=true fails; ICv1 requires deletionVectors not be present in the protocol at all, not merely inactive.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_read_snapshot_2_7_feature_listed_property_true_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV1] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true succeeds; icebergCompatV1 is writer-only.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_empty_commit_2_7_feature_listed_property_true_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV1] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true succeeds.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_read_snapshot_2_7_no_feature_listed_with_property_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (2,7)+[columnMapping] table with delta.enableIcebergCompatV1=true but icebergCompatV1 absent from writerFeatures succeeds; icebergCompatV1 is writer-only and the orphan property has no effect on reads.

cases.name: iceberg_v1_empty_commit_2_7_without_column_mapping_protocol_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (2,7)+[icebergCompatV1] table without columnMapping in writerFeatures fails; the spec requires columnMapping to be co-listed whenever icebergCompatV1 is listed.
